context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements partial receipt tracking with damaged goods quarantine and a vendor scorecard with the correct metrics, period, and weighted formula.

checklist.name: Partial status tracking
checklist.description: The receiveGoodsAgainstPO function sets PO status to 'partial' when not all line quantities have been fully received, and 'received' when all lines are complete

checklist.name: Per-line quantity tracking
checklist.description: The function updates quantity_received on individual po_lines (not just the PO header), accumulating received quantities across multiple deliveries

checklist.name: Good condition inventory update
checklist.description: Inventory is only incremented for items received in 'good' condition — damaged items do NOT cause an inventory increment

checklist.name: Damaged goods quarantine
checklist.description: Damaged items are inserted into a separate table (damagedGoods, quarantine, or equivalent) rather than being discarded or merged with good inventory

checklist.name: Receipt in transaction
checklist.description: The receiveGoodsAgainstPO function wraps all database updates (line updates, inventory, damaged goods, status) in a single database transaction

checklist.name: 90-day default period
checklist.description: The generateVendorScorecard function defaults to a 90-day lookback period when periodDays is not specified

checklist.name: On-time rate formula
checklist.description: On-time rate is calculated as (number of POs received on or before expected_delivery) / (total POs in period), expressed as a ratio 0–1

checklist.name: Fill rate formula
checklist.description: Fill rate is calculated as total quantity_received / total quantity_ordered across all lines in the period, expressed as a ratio 0–1

checklist.name: Defect rate formula
checklist.description: Defect rate is calculated as total damaged units / total received units, expressed as a ratio 0–1

checklist.name: Scorecard weights
checklist.description: The overall score formula applies weights of 40% to on-time rate, 40% to fill rate, and 20% to (1 - defect rate), scaled to 0–100

checklist.name: Weights documented
checklist.description: scorecard_explanation.md explicitly states the formula and the three weights (40/40/20) used to compute the overall score
